notes: Chronological ledger of compliance/regulatory events relevant to US UAS procurement. Hand-seeded with major milestones. AUDIT REQUIRED on exact dates and scopes.

event_types.law: Statute enacted or modified (NDAA, FAA Modernization, ASDA)
event_types.list_update: Addition to an official registry (Blue UAS, FCC Covered List, DoD 1260H)
event_types.program: Major program award or program change

events.title: NDAA FY2019 §889 effective
events.summary: Prohibits federal procurement from entities using covered Chinese telecom/surveillance gear (Huawei, ZTE, Hikvision, Dahua, Hytera). Not UAS-specific but sets the pattern.

events.title: NDAA FY2020 §848 enacted
events.summary: DoD may not procure or operate UAS manufactured in China or containing Chinese 'critical components' (FC, radio, camera, gimbal, GCS software, storage).

events.title: DIU Blue UAS Cleared List launched
events.summary: DoD's first curated list of NDAA-compliant UAS platforms with cybersecurity and hardware vetting. Run by Defense Innovation Unit.

events.title: NDAA FY2023 §817 effective
events.summary: Extends §848 UAS procurement prohibition beyond DoD to additional federal agencies.

events.title: ORQA acquires ImmersionRC
events.summary: Croatian FPV company ORQA (FPV.One goggles) acquires UK/HK legendary FPV vendor ImmersionRC, taking ownership of Tramp VTX line and Ghost RC control protocol. Consolidates into full-stack NDAA-compliant FPV ecosystem.

events.title: Skydio exits consumer market
events.summary: Skydio announces exit from consumer drone market to focus entirely on enterprise and defense. Pivotal strategic move that positions Skydio as the flagship US defense drone company.

events.title: Unusual Machines acquires Rotor Riot + Fat Shark
events.summary: UMAC (NASDAQ: UMAC) acquires Rotor Riot FPV retailer and Fat Shark FPV goggle brand in its pivot toward onshore NDAA-compliant FPV parts manufacturing.

events.title: Donald Trump Jr. joins Unusual Machines board
events.summary: Significant press coverage and retail-investor interest; opens political/DC access doors material for a defense-FPV pivot. Drove UMAC stock price sharply higher on announcement.

events.title: FAR 52.240-1 final rule published
events.summary: Federal Acquisition Regulation implementing the American Security Drone Act (NDAA FY2024 §§1821-1832). Extends UAS procurement prohibition government-wide.

events.title: Blue UAS Cleared List transitions from DIU to DCMA
events.summary: Operational responsibility for the Blue UAS Cleared List moves from Defense Innovation Unit to Defense Contract Management Agency. Registry now at bluelist.dcma.mil.

events.title: FAR 52.240-1 effective — ASDA government-wide ban takes hold
events.summary: The American Security Drone Act UAS procurement prohibition becomes binding on every federal agency. Covered foreign entity list on SAM.gov.

events.title: FCC Covered List — foreign UAS categorically prohibited
events.summary: FCC categorically prohibits equipment authorization for foreign-produced UAS and UAS critical components. Applies to EVERY US buyer — commercial, hobby, federal, state, local. DJI and Autel named explicitly. Narrow Blue UAS / Framework exemption. Largest single market shift since §848.

events.title: NDAA FY2026 expands scope to ground vehicles
events.summary: Expands foreign-made prohibition to Unmanned Ground Vehicle Systems from covered foreign entities.
